productDisplayName: Nike Men Ruckus Mid Grey Casual Shoes
description: There is nothing better than a lightweight technical shoe that provides loads of comfort and durability. The nike Ruckus Mid Canvas Skate shoes is a powerful sneaker, with its simple style and extremely durable construction.UpperCanvas upper with synthetic leather overlays for durabilityMeshed and padded collar and tongue for all day comfortPerforations for breathabilityHigh ankle collar and heel cup for better support to the lower legLacing system for snug, customised Fit Removable footbed to accomodate an orthoticnike swoosh on either sides and brand name on the collarMidsolePU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for versatile traction and absolute gripShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
